title: Customize chart colors in one location in the dashboard
excerpt: It would be great to be able to customize all chart colors in one location in the dashboards and board views. Right now, I have to make notes on how I want to color code the Y axis and then go to each individual chart to…

posts.author: beth1021 (Elisabeth Juliano)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to be able to customize all chart colors in one location in the dashboards and board views. Right now, I have to make notes on how I want to color code the Y axis and then go to each individual chart to customize the colors. This takes a lot of time.

Use Case: We have dashboards that show individual teams and team members’ time submitted for different projects. Each chart though color codes the projects differently or randomly, so I have to go to each chart and select the colors for each project so each chart matches.

The Issue: If I don’t match the colors for each project in each chart, people tend to look at the first chart, note the color, and then search all the other charts for that same color even though the color is randomly being used for a different project.
